acceptance_requirements.smallest_next_task: freeze a local execution-parity contract for next-open plus one exit model

acceptance_requirements.missing_evidence: ATR and Distance/ATR native parity is accepted, but typed AST registration, canonicalization/hashing, and MQL5 translation are not admitted; remaining primitives lack matched MQL5/native parity
acceptance_requirements.smallest_next_task: local-only typed AST admission for ATR and Distance/ATR

acceptance_requirements.missing_evidence: no paired session, Friday-close, ORB, rollover, daily-reset, Monday-open, or DST native case

complete one execution-model strategy canary after local generator support

acceptance_requirements.missing_evidence: no complete experiment-level repeated replay bundle
acceptance_requirements.smallest_next_task: add one complete replay fixture binding trade, metric, simulator, and content identities
specify a deterministic known-edge fixture and required edge-destruction statistic

historical_label_discrepancies: Phase 2J and 2L documentation records native success, but durable raw compile/run evidence is committed only for Phase 2N.
Phase 2N commit 29be0d0 documented ignored artifacts; f201077 is the durable evidence repair.
The Phase 2A-B-C labels include substantial implementation and local acceptance but do not establish the roadmap's full Rust-to-MT5 parity gate.
recommended_sequence: 2R accepted Phase-2Q evidence and ATR/Distance-ATR grammar-admission inventory
2S local typed AST admission for ATR and Distance/ATR
2T local execution-strategy generator and next-open/one-exit reconciliation contract
2U native hand-designed strategy cases, session/time/DST cases, Linux replay, and placebo integrity fixtures
2V complete Phase-2 gate audit before any Phase-3 authorization

next_task.scope: Local-only deterministic MQL5 MACD fixed-data runtime and tester generation from the committed MACD period-4 Rust fixture; no native compilation, MT5 execution, search, or Phase 3.
next_task.why_next: MACD is a foundational primitive with an actual committed Rust fixture containing MACD period 4 and its downstream slope values, while it has no accepted MQL5 generation or native parity. The inventory's cited EMA fixture does not contain EMA and is therefore not a qualifying real fixture.

prerequisites.rust_semantics: fixed period 4 with the committed Rust MACD output and downstream slope fixture

required_outputs: frozen MACD Rust evidence and vectors
deterministic MQL5 runtime and fixed-data tester source/manifests
separate Rust, runtime, tester, and package identities
